events.text: Saud Abdulhamid (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Wagner Pina (Cabo Verde) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Ali Lajami replaces Hassan Al Tambakti because of an injury.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Musab Al Juwayr replaces Abdullah Al Khaibari.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Nuno da Costa replaces Dailon Livramento.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Hélio Varela replaces Willy Semedo.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Mohammed Abu Al Shamat replaces Salem Al Dawsari.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Abdullah Al Hamddan replaces Sultan Mandash.
Nasser Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Laros Duarte replaces Jamiro Monteiro.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Garry Rodrigues replaces Ryan Mendes.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Moteb Al Harbi replaces Nawaf Bu Washl.
Feras Al Brikan (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Steven Moreira replaces Wagner Pina.
